projectDescription: Minimal JavaScript and CSS library for creating accessible modal dialogs with focus trapping and keyboard navigation.
keyFeatures: Accessible modal dialogs with ARIA support and focus trapping
Multiple modal types: basic, linked (URL hash), arrow navigation, strong (non-dismissible)
Keyboard navigation with Escape and Arrow key support
Browser history integration for linked modals
Automatic embed fitting and resetting for iframes
Custom events for modal lifecycle (open.srfc, close.srfc)
TypeScript support with full type definitions
publicApiSurface: Srfc.init() - Initialize the library and register modal events
Srfc.open(id: string) - Open a modal by ID
Srfc.close() - Close the currently active modal
data-srfc attribute - Define modal containers and types
data-srfc-open attribute - Trigger elements to open modals
data-srfc-close attribute - Elements to close modals
data-srfc-autofocus attribute - Auto-focus elements on modal open
open.srfc event - Dispatched when modal opens
close.srfc event - Dispatched when modal closes
